channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Oyo State Suspends School Trips After Teacher Killed in Ogbomoso Attack
item.description: Dem bury Adesiyan Adegboye, one teacher wey dem kill for Ogbomoso after armed bandits attack three schools last Friday. Adegboye, wey dey 49 years old, dey among the teachers wey lose their life durin...

item.title: Winnipeg Fundraiser Highlights Support for Children with Juvenile Arthritis
item.description: Eleven-year-old Rosalie Leschyson from Winnipeg enjoys activities like playing the piano and reading, but her path hasn’t always been easy. Nearly five years ago, she began experiencing persistent wri...

item.title: WA Premier Faces Backlash Over Fracking Comments Amid Gas Supply Debate
item.description: Western Australian Premier Roger Cook has sparked criticism after suggesting that fracking in the Kimberley might be necessary if Woodside Energy's $30 billion Browse gas project does not proceed. Coo...

item.title: Sophia Loren On Set in Vittorio De Sica's Marriage Italian Style (1964)
item.description: The 1964 Italian film Marriage Italian Style, directed by the acclaimed Vittorio De Sica, remains one of the standout productions of Italian cinema's golden age. Starring the dynamic duo of Sophia Lor...

item.title: A Review of Grimaldi’s Cuccina at Durban Country Club
item.description: Grimaldi’s Cuccina at Durban Country Club offers a solid Italian dining experience in Stamford Hill. The restaurant has a modern and smart setting, with friendly service and an option to sit outside o...

item.title: Chot Reyes says Bol Bol's injury significantly affects TNT Tropang 5G
item.description: TNT Tropang 5G coach Chot Reyes recently acknowledged that the team is facing a major setback due to the injury of star player Bol Bol. The injury, which occurred ahead of crucial PBA matches, is expe...

item.title: Transformer Fire Causes Widespread Power Outage in Gurugram
item.description: On Thursday, Gurugram faced a significant power disruption after a fire broke out at the main transformer of the 220 KVA power station located in Sector-72. The incident caused electricity supply inte...

item.title: NPA challenges contempt conviction and arrest warrant for prosecutor in Joe Sibanyoni extortion matter
item.description: The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) in South Africa has taken urgent legal steps to prevent the arrest of one of its prosecutors, Mkhuseli Ntaba, who was held in contempt of court for failing to ...

item.title: Nato Conducts Underground Exercises in London to Test Readiness Against Potential Russian Threat
item.description: Nato forces have conducted a large-scale exercise at Charing Cross Tube station in London, converting a disused platform into an underground command centre. The exercise, part of Operation Arcade Stri...

item.title: Tanzania Government Urges Policy Actions to Reduce Economic Risks from Gulf Region Instability
item.description: The Tanzanian government has called for immediate and coordinated policy steps to protect the country's economy from the effects of the ongoing crisis in the Gulf region. On May 22, 2026, Minister of ...

item.title: Bohol Journalist Ric Obedencio Passes Away at 69
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Ric Obedencio, a respected journalist from Bohol, passed away on May 22, 2026, at the age of 69. His family confirmed the news through a social media post by his daughter, Hannah...

item.title: Halifax mayor reacts with humour to Regina's social media ad targeting residents
item.description: Halifax Mayor Andy Filmore and his office found amusement in a recent social media advertisement from Economic Development Regina, which encouraged Halifax residents to consider moving to Regina. The ...

item.title: Katsina State Allocates ₦6.1bn for Renovation and Upgrade of 110 Schools
item.description: Governor Dikko Radda of Katsina don announce say him don start second phase of School Improvement Grants wey reach over ₦6.1 billion to upgrade 110 schools across the state. The governor talk say this...

item.title: Trump permanently seals family tax returns, raising concerns over transparency and political norms
item.description: This week, Donald Trump successfully achieved one of the boldest moves of his career by permanently sealing his family’s tax returns. The action has stirred debates over transparency and accountabilit...

item.title: Supreme Court allows return of certain persons sent to Bangladesh for citizenship verification
item.description: The Union government informed the Supreme Court on Friday that it would bring back some individuals who had earlier been sent to Bangladesh, in order to verify their Indian citizenship. This action is...

item.title: Papa Penny leaves MKP citing internal sabotage, joins Afrika Mayibuye Movement
item.description: Gezane “Papa Penny” Kobane, a veteran musician and former MP for the MK Party (MKP), has officially resigned from the party citing internal conflicts and sabotage. In an interview with Newzroom Afrika...

item.title: Jack Antonoff Talks Music, Life and Personal Reflections
item.description: Grammy-winning musician and producer Jack Antonoff, known for his collaborations with Taylor Swift and Sabrina Carpenter, has been keeping busy with multiple projects, including soundtrack work for An...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of 'The Deer Hunter': Challenges, Dedication, and Unforgettable Moments
item.description: The making of Michael Cimino’s 1978 film 'The Deer Hunter' was as intense and legendary as the movie itself. Cimino demanded extreme realism, pushing actors and crew to their physical and emotional li...

item.title: Governor Fubara Confirms Continuation of Infrastructure Projects in Rivers State
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, don reassure citizens say him administration still dey committed to finish all ongoing infrastructural projects across the state despite recent political ...

item.title: Gordon Parks Captures Eartha Kitt with Kittens in 1952 LIFE Photo Essay
item.description: In June 1952, legendary photographer Gordon Parks created a memorable series of portraits featuring Eartha Kitt for LIFE magazine. The photo essay captured intimate and stylish moments of Kitt while s...
